name: Starter Builder Plan
summary: A low-barrier plan designed to build the habit of consistent saving and investing.
details: The Starter Builder Plan is the easiest way to begin investing with very little capital. Funds are placed in stable, low-volatility instruments so new investors can experience steady growth while building confidence and a monthly contribution habit.
highlights: Open with as little as $100
Add funds anytime with no penalty
Monthly statements in plain language
Free 30-minute onboarding session with an advisor

name: Education Fund Plan
idealFor: Students saving for tuition or training
summary: A flexible, short-term plan built around school terms and tuition deadlines.
details: The Education Fund Plan keeps savings accessible while still earning a modest return. Contribution schedules can be aligned to academic terms, and funds can be withdrawn ahead of tuition deadlines without losing accrued interest on completed periods.
highlights: No long-term lock-in
Align withdrawals to school terms
Automatic reminders before deadlines
Available to full-time and part-time students

name: Growth Accelerator Plan
summary: A diversified, mid-term plan for investors ready to grow consistent contributions.
details: The Growth Accelerator Plan spreads contributions across a diversified mix of bonds, equities, and short-term funds. It suits investors who can commit to regular monthly contributions over a two-year horizon and want meaningfully higher growth than a savings account.
highlights: Diversified across multiple asset types
Quarterly performance reviews with an advisor
Option to increase contributions at any review
Early withdrawal available with a reduced-return adjustment

name: Business Growth Plan
summary: A working-capital plan that turns business profit into a structured growth fund.
details: The Business Growth Plan is designed for owners who want to set aside a portion of monthly revenue into a managed fund rather than leaving it idle. Contributions can scale with revenue, and the plan includes guidance on balancing reinvestment in the business versus the fund.
highlights: Variable contribution schedule tied to revenue
Dedicated advisor for business owners
Mid-term liquidity for equipment or expansion costs
Annual tax-season summary report

name: Premium Wealth Plan
summary: An actively managed, higher-growth plan for compounding larger holdings.
details: The Premium Wealth Plan is actively managed across a broader range of growth-oriented assets. It is intended for investors who understand and accept higher short-term volatility in exchange for a higher long-term growth target, and who do not need to access the funds within three years.
highlights: Active management with monthly rebalancing
Priority access to a senior advisor
Annual in-person portfolio review
Reinvestment of returns by default, with opt-out
